assertions.description: REVIEW: 67 of 68 current_sense detections are false positives — R49 paired with unrelated ICs (SN74LVC1T45, CAT24M01X, etc.) that merely share GND net
REVIEW: R30 (4R7) / R48 (0R15) on ISNS_H → GND detected as divider but these are current sense shunt resistors
REVIEW: R56 (0R33) / R48 (0R15) on ISNS_H → GND same issue — current sense, not divider
REVIEW: R5/R4 (100k/100k) on ~{CY_RESET} → GND is a pull-up/pull-down pair on a digital reset line, not a voltage sensing divider
+3V3 power rail with 85 power symbols across 2 sheets not present in nets dict at all. Every component powered by +3V3 has a dangling power pin.
"u1" = 0.1uF not parsed. Pattern: unit prefix before digit (u1, n47, p33). Parser only handles digit-first like "4u7".
